prompt: Rank from lowest to highest pitch

items.name: Bass guitar lowest note
items.fact: 41 Hz — E1, the lowest standard bass note

items.name: Middle C (piano)
items.fact: 261.6 Hz — the central reference note in music

items.name: Highest piano note
items.fact: 4,186 Hz — C8, top of a standard 88-key piano

items.name: Human hearing upper limit
items.fact: ~20,000 Hz — you lose this range with age
